purpose: Owner-facing preview send — the same invitation email body that evaluators receive, dispatched to a single owner address so they can eyeball the formatting + attachment before the public list goes out.
schema_notes: Same shape as the per-country invitee files. Add additional preview-recipient rows here when more owners want a preview copy.

entities.name: Marc (Owner Preview)
entities.services: Owner copy — see exactly what beta evaluators receive.
entities.notes: Preview channel only. Not part of the public outreach tally.
